name: modelgate
description: Local OpenAI-compatible model request router and provider hot-switch gateway.

scripts.build:desktop: npm run build && npm run prepare:desktop-server && npm --prefix desktop run tauri -- build
scripts.build:desktop:nsis: npm run build && npm run prepare:desktop-server && npm --prefix desktop run tauri -- build --bundles nsis
scripts.build:desktop:debug: npm run build && npm run prepare:desktop-server && npm --prefix desktop run tauri -- build --debug
scripts.release:prepare: npm run typecheck && npm run build && npm run build:desktop-ui && npm run build:desktop
